MakeAmmo_9mm_Reprimand_FMJ.label: make 9mm Reprimand (FMJ) x200
MakeAmmo_9mm_Reprimand_FMJ.description: Manufacture 200 standard 9mm FMJ cartridges for the Reprimand.

MakeAmmo_9mm_Reprimand_AP.label: make 9mm Reprimand (AP) x200
MakeAmmo_9mm_Reprimand_AP.description: Manufacture 200 hardened 9mm AP cartridges for the Reprimand.

MakeAmmo_12ga_Cluster_Buckshot.label: make 12-gauge Cluster (buckshot) x120
MakeAmmo_12ga_Cluster_Buckshot.description: Manufacture 120 buckshot shells for the Cluster shotgun.

MakeAmmo_12ga_Cluster_Slug.label: make 12-gauge Cluster (slug) x120
MakeAmmo_12ga_Cluster_Slug.description: Manufacture 120 slug shells for the Cluster shotgun.

MakeAmmo_45_Comrade_FMJ.label: make .45 Comrade Arms (FMJ) x160
MakeAmmo_45_Comrade_FMJ.description: Manufacture 160 .45 FMJ cartridges for the Comrade Arms.

MakeAmmo_45_Comrade_HP.label: make .45 Comrade Arms (HP) x160
MakeAmmo_45_Comrade_HP.description: Manufacture 160 .45 hollow-point cartridges for the Comrade Arms.

MakeAmmo_Overwatch_FMJ.label: make Overwatch rifle (FMJ) x120
MakeAmmo_Overwatch_FMJ.description: Manufacture 120 standard service cartridges for the Overwatch.

MakeAmmo_Overwatch_AP.label: make Overwatch rifle (AP) x120
MakeAmmo_Overwatch_AP.description: Manufacture 120 armor-piercing cartridges for the Overwatch.

MakeAmmo_Typhoon_FMJ.label: make Typhoon rifle (FMJ) x160
MakeAmmo_Typhoon_FMJ.description: Manufacture 160 standard FMJ cartridges for the Typhoon.

MakeAmmo_Typhoon_AP.label: make Typhoon rifle (AP) x160
MakeAmmo_Typhoon_AP.description: Manufacture 160 armor-piercing cartridges for the Typhoon.

MakeAmmo_Eruptor_HE.label: make Eruptor grenade (HE) x16
MakeAmmo_Eruptor_HE.description: Manufacture 16 high-explosive grenades for the Eruptor.

MakeAmmo_Eruptor_Frag.label: make Eruptor grenade (frag) x16
MakeAmmo_Eruptor_Frag.description: Manufacture 16 fragmentation grenades for the Eruptor.

MakeAmmo_20mm_MaulerMG_FMJ.label: make 20mm Mauler MG (FMJ) x80
MakeAmmo_20mm_MaulerMG_FMJ.description: Manufacture 80 heavy 20mm FMJ ammunition for the Mauler MG.

MakeAmmo_20mm_MaulerMG_AP.label: make 20mm Mauler MG (AP) x80
MakeAmmo_20mm_MaulerMG_AP.description: Manufacture 80 heavy 20mm AP ammunition for the Mauler MG.

MakeAmmo_20mm_ATRifle_AP.label: make 20mm AT Rifle (AP) x40
MakeAmmo_20mm_ATRifle_AP.description: Manufacture 40 anti-materiel AP rounds for the AT Rifle.

MakeAmmo_20mm_ATRifle_APHE.label: make 20mm AT Rifle (APHE) x40
MakeAmmo_20mm_ATRifle_APHE.description: Manufacture 40 anti-materiel APHE rounds for the AT Rifle.

MakeAmmo_ArbiterCell_Standard.label: make Arbiter cell (standard) x40
MakeAmmo_ArbiterCell_Standard.description: Manufacture 40 standard pulse cells for the Arbiter.

MakeAmmo_ArbiterCell_Overcharge.label: make Arbiter cell (overcharged) x40
MakeAmmo_ArbiterCell_Overcharge.description: Manufacture 40 overcharged pulse cells for the Arbiter.

MakeAmmo_700Smart_CS_Standard.label: make .700 Smart Sidearm x60
MakeAmmo_700Smart_CS_Standard.description: Manufacture 60 elite smart rounds for the Commander Sidearm.

MakeAmmo_LancerCell_Standard.label: make Lancer cell x20
MakeAmmo_LancerCell_Standard.description: Manufacture 20 high-output precision energy cells for the Lancer.

MakeAmmo_RedGlare_HE.label: make Red Glare grenade (HE) x8
MakeAmmo_RedGlare_HE.description: Manufacture 8 high-energy explosive plasma grenades for the Red Glare.

MakeAmmo_RedGlare_Frag.label: make Red Glare grenade (frag) x8
MakeAmmo_RedGlare_Frag.description: Manufacture 8 fragmentation plasma grenades for the Red Glare.
